title: Big Snake King
subTitle: After they slight a giant snake and disturb its slumber, the people of a village engage in a desperate ploy of human sacrifice to stay safe.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Gaon Ki Ladaai
subTitle: A respected chieftain of a village falls in love with the daughter of a headmaster and decides to marry her. His engagement is interrupted by a jailor.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: King
subTitle: The heir to a large estate is killed by his conniving relatives. Meanwhile, his lookalike, a gangster, falls in love with a singer and impersonates a software engineer to impress her.

title: Magic Robot
subTitle: The peaceful life of a family is ruined when a vengeful spirit possesses their daughter and their car also turns into a magic robot. The family must exorcise the ghosts in order to restore peace.

title: Veera The Power
subTitle: Porus, a strong-minded IPS aspirant from a middle-class family in Chennai, comes across a series of dark secrets while investigating his sister's murder.

title: Chennai vs China
subTitle: Aravind is a descendant of a martial arts expert, Bodhidharma. He must revive the fighting skills to stop Dong Lee, who comes to India to wage a biological war.

title: Hero The Bullet
subTitle: Shiva, a young man, is looked down upon by his father due to his irresponsible behaviour. He soon gets embroiled in a tussle with an egoistic gangster who threatens his family.

title: Ka
subTitle: Abducted under mysterious circumstances, an unknown inquisitor uses a hypnotising device to target a man with a proclivity of reading others' letters.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Madhu is a police officer who always strives to protect Kunjali, a porter, from getting into trouble. However, Kunjali throws caution to the wind and fights for the rights of the workers.

title: Guna 369
subTitle: The life of Guna, a happy-go-lucky man, turns upside down when he is falsely framed for a murder and imprisoned. After his release, he sets off to hunt the real culprits and expose their crimes.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Sheshnaag
subTitle: Pritam and Banu, two shape-shifting snakes in human form, seek protection from a young man when an evil priest tries to hunt them down and use them in a ritual for wealth and immortality.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: An undercover cop, who is also the son of an MLA, strives to apprehend a dangerous don who is involved in illicit activities.

title: Bruce Lee
subTitle: Bruce Lee and his friends get into a fight with the close aides of Ramdoss, an evil don. When the gangster kidnaps Lee's girlfriend, he plans to rescue her.

title: Khilona Bana Khalnayak
subTitle: Tatya Vinchu, a dying gangster, transfer his soul into a doll. The ventriloquist Lakshya unknowingly brings the sinister doll into his life, leading to chaos.

title: Tripura

title: Himmatwar
subTitle: The son of a wealthy man leaves his family post a misunderstanding. Later, when he saves a police officer from an evil man, this results in him earning the latter's wrath.

title: Bimbisara
subTitle: Getting betrayed by his brother, ancient evil king Bimbisara teleports to the modern-day world and traps in the mirror. Desperate to return to his empire, Bimbisara searches for the mirror to break free.

title: Barood
subTitle: Jai, an honest police officer, falls in love with Neha, Mr Singhal's daughter. However, he suspects Mr Singhal to be a criminal and tries to catch him red-handed.

title: Night Drive
subTitle: A young couple's endeavour to enjoy a night drive is meted out with a terrible punishment when they get into an accident that leads to an investigation followed by more troubles.
